privileged_info_for_vlm: The target date for all entries is 2026-03-10. The required entries are: 1) EMP018: Time In 05:55, Time Out 14:05 (02:05 PM). 2) EMP019: Time In 06:00, Time Out 14:00 (02:00 PM) - this applies the HR policy for a missing punch-out. 3) EMP020: Time In 05:45, Time Out 14:15 (02:15 PM). Note: The Sentrifugo database maps these IDs to Nicole Anderson, Tyler Moore, and Lauren Jackson respectively, which differs from the names in the task description. Verification should be based on Employee ID and the entered times.
